overlay.footer.model: Type to search · ↑/↓ select · Enter confirm · Esc clear/close
overlay.footer.approval: Enter select · A once · Shift+A session · D deny · Esc inspect transcript
overlay.footer.cancel: ↑/↓ choose scope · Enter cancel · Esc keep running
overlay.footer.agents: ↑/↓ select · Enter detail · X cancel child · Esc close
overlay.footer.todos: ↑/↓ select · H hide completed · Esc close
overlay.footer.mcp: ↑/↓ select · R refresh · Shift+R reconnect · Esc close
overlay.footer.recovery: ↑/↓ select · Enter inspect · /reconcile confirms an unknown side effect · Esc close
overlay.footer.approval_short: A once · D deny · Esc back
overlay.help.line1: Enter submit · Ctrl+J newline · Esc close/cancel/remove last image
overlay.help.line2: Ctrl+V paste image from clipboard · text paste if no image
overlay.help.line3: Ctrl+P commands · Ctrl+M model · Ctrl+R reasoning · Shift+Tab approval
overlay.help.line4: Ctrl+B agents · PageUp/PageDown transcript · Tab cards
